name: dev.slideforge/slideforge
title: SlideForge
description: Deterministic, fully editable PowerPoint from typed slide intents. 150+ layouts, brand templates.

environmentVariables.name: SLIDEFORGE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SlideForge API key (starts with sf_live_). Required to run tool calls; schema discovery works without it. Get one at https://slideforge.dev.
